transcript_preview: User logs into the app with email and password. Server validates credentials. On success, server returns JWT token. Browser stores the token and redirects to dashboard.
raw_output:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Server
    participant Browser

    Server-->>User: Validate credentials
    Server->>Browser: Return JWT token
    Browser-->>Server: Store token
    Browser->>Dashboard: Redirect
